keySetup.title: Fokotuʻu hoʻo kī meʻa
keySetup.description: Ko e meʻa ko ʻeni ʻoku ʻikai ke ne maʻu hoʻo kī fakatautaha. Fakakau ha fakamolemole fakapuliki password, pe fakatupu ha kī foʻou (te ke lava ʻo lau ha fakamolemole foʻou mei he taimi ko ʻeni).

keySetup.imported: Kī fakatautaha ʻosi fakakau ki he meʻa ko ʻeni. Te ke lava ʻo lau ha fakamolemole motuʻa he taimi ko ʻeni.

auth.headline: Fakamolemole fakamālie ki he taha kotoa, ki he feituʻu kotoa
auth.description: Fakapuliki fakatautaha ki he fakatau, fakaliliu ki he lea 100+, fakamolemole fakamotuʻa, mo e lea/vitio.

feature.disappearing: Fakamolemole fakamotuʻa mo e fakamālie ʻo lau
feature.privacy: Fakamālie fakamuʻomuʻa. Ko hoʻo fakamālie, ko hoʻo pule.

hero.line1: Fakamolemole fakamālie ki he taha kotoa, ki he feituʻu kotoa — mo e
hero.sub: Maʻu ha fika telefoni fakamālie taʻe totongi ke lea mo fakamolemole ki he māmani kotoa ʻi he Wi-Fi pe data. Fakamālie fakapuliki fakatautaha, fakamolemole fakamotuʻa, mo e lea/vitio HD — mo e meʻa ʻi loto ke tokoni ki he fakatautaha ʻi he fonua kehe.
hero.freeNote: Lea mo fakamolemole fakatau taʻe totongi. AI fakalakalaka mo e meʻa fakamolemole ʻoku fiemālie ʻoku fie maʻu ha fakalakalaka.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 mata. Fakaʻata ha password malohi, taʻe tatau.
registration.smsConsent: ʻI he fakatupu ha tohi fakamolemole, ʻoku ke tali ki he fakamālie SMS ʻoku fekauʻaki mo hoʻo Chatforia (hangē ko e fakamolemole mei he kau fakamolemole). ʻOku lava ʻo fie totongi ha meʻa & data. Te ke lava ʻo fakatau ʻi he taimi kotoa ʻi he Settings.

profile.themeFreeNotice: ʻOku ke ʻi he Free—fakaʻata Sun/Moon vave ʻi olunga. Fakalakalaka ke fakalelei ha theme kehe.
profile.backupDesc: Fakamolemole hoʻo kī fakapuliki ke fakafoki hoʻo fakamolemole ʻi ha meʻa kehe fakamālie.

profile.freePlanCopy: ʻOku ke ʻi he fakatau taʻe totongi. Fakalakalaka ke fakalelei ha meʻa kehe hangē ko fakamolemole, fika kehe, mo e fakamālie fakalakalaka.
profile.portalOpenFailed: ʻIkai lava ʻo fakaava billing portal. Fakafoki.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Fakamālie au kapau ʻoku langa hoku fakamolemole

profile.callTextForwardingTitle: Fakafolosi lea mo fakamolemole ki hoʻo fika telefoni pe email fakamālie.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Fakafolosi lea mo fakamolemole ki hoʻo fika telefoni pe email fakamālie. Lea/fakamolemole fakahō ʻe lava ʻo fakaava hoʻo fika Chatforia.
profile.errE164: Fakahu ha fika telefoni E.164 fakatonu (e.g., +15551234567).
profile.errSmsDest: Fili ha fakahō taha pe (telefoni pe email).
profile.errQuietHours: Houa fakamālie kuo fie ʻi he 0 mo e 23.
profile.ageBandHint: ʻOku mau fakamālie ha taʻu pe (ʻikai hoʻo ʻaho fā). ʻOku fakaʻata ke fakamālie ha fakamolemole fakatonu fakatonu.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Fakaʻata fakatonu taʻu ʻi he Fakamolemole fakatonu
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Kapau ʻoku ʻon, mau fie fakatau koe mo e kau tangata ʻi he taʻu fakatonu.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Kau taʻu 13–17 ʻoku fakatau mo e kau taʻu 13–17 pe. Kau taʻu lalahi ʻoku ʻikai ke fakatau mo e kau taʻu 13–17.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ki he fakamālie, ko e tohi fakamolemole ʻi he taʻu 13–17 ʻoku fakatau mo e kau taʻu 13–17 pe ʻi he Fakamolemole fakatonu.
profile.foriaRemember: Tuku ke Ria fakamanatu ha meʻa ʻoku ke tala ki ai
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Kapau ʻoku ʻon, ʻe lava ʻe Foria ʻo fakaʻata hoʻo fakamolemole fakatonu fakamuimui (mo koe pe) ke fakamālie e fakamolemole. Te ke lava ʻo fakatau ʻi he taimi kotoa.
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Fakaʻata kapau ʻoku ʻikai ke maʻu hoʻo fakamālie lea.
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemail mei hoʻo fika Chatforia ʻoku fakamālie ʻi hoʻo fakamolemole Voicemail. Te ke lava ʻo fakalelei fakatonu mo fakafolosi ʻi he fakatau fakalelei.
profile.portHint: Fie fakamālie hoʻo fika fakamolemole? Te ke lava ʻo port ia ki he Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: Chatforia eSIM
esim.desc: Maʻu data telefoni ki he Chatforia kapau ʻoku ke ʻikai ʻi he Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Pule hoʻo fakatau telefoni Chatforia, fika, fakafolosi, mo e fakafolosi fika.

port.heading: Port hoʻo fika fakamolemole

port.success: Port request ʻosi fakamolemole! Mau fakamālie koe.

wireless.exhausted: Hoʻo data ʻosi. Fai ha pack foʻou ke fakamālie data telefoni.

error.checkout: ʻIkai lava ʻo kamata checkout ki he fakatau Fāmili. Fakafoki.

upgrade.title: Fakalakalaka

upgrade.subtitle: Fili ha fakatau app, fakakau data pack kiate koe, pe fakakau data mo hoʻo fāmili — kotoa ʻi ha feituʻu taha.

mobile.title: Chatforia Telefoni (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Fakakau data fakamāmani ke fakamālie Chatforia kapau ʻoku ʻikai ʻi he Wi-Fi. Fakamolemole ʻoku fakatonu ʻi hoʻo fonua mo hoʻo paʻanga.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Fili ha data pack fakamāmani taha ke fakamālie Chatforia kapau ʻoku ke telefoni pe ʻikai ʻi he Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: ʻIkai mau fakatau data pack ʻi lalo 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: Data vave ki he ngāue lahi
features.throttle: Vave ʻe fakamālie kapau ngāue lahi

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs ʻoku fie maʻu ha meʻa fakalelei eSIM mo taʻe fakapuliki. ʻOku kehe ʻi he telefoni, carrier, mo e fonua. Fakamālie mo e vave ʻoku kehe ʻi he fonua.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: Fakakau 3 GB data vave — fakatonu ki he fakamolemole siʻi mo e lea siʻi.
small.bestFor: Telefoni siʻi, fakamolemole siʻi, mo e lea siʻi

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: Fakakau 5 GB data vave ki he telefoni, commuting, mo e lea VoIP fakatonu.
medium.bestFor: Telefoni fakamotuʻa, lea VoIP fakatonu, mo e maps

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: Fakakau 10 GB data vave ki he fakamolemole lahi, lea, mo e vitio ʻi he Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Fakamolemole lahi, lea, vitio, mo e hotspot
large.aria: Fai Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: Fakatau eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Ko e ngāue data ʻoku fakatonu ʻi he founga ʻoku ke fakaʻata Chatforia (lea, vitio, meʻa, mo e app kehe ʻi hoʻo telefoni).

family.title: Chatforia Fāmili (data fakakau)
family.subtitle: Fakakau ha data pool taha ʻi hoʻo fāmili. Fika taha, kau Chatforia fakakau, fakamāmani.

small.title: Fāmili Small
small.desc: Fakakau 20 GB data vave fakakau — fakatonu ki he 2–3 kau fakamolemole siʻi.

medium.title: Fāmili Medium
medium.desc: Fakakau 40 GB data vave fakakau — fakatonu ki he 3–5 kau fakamolemole fakatonu.

large.title: Fāmili Large
large.desc: Fakakau 80 GB data vave fakakau — ki he fāmili pāoa ʻoku ʻi he taimi kotoa ʻi he neti.

feature.shared: Data pool fakakau ki hoʻo fāmili
feature.membersMore: Fakatonu ki he 3–5 kau fakamolemole fakatonu
feature.manage: Pule limit ki he taha kotoa
feature.topUp: Fakakau pack kehe ʻi he taimi kotoa
feature.fairUse: Fakatonu ki he fakatonu fair-use mo e limit fonua

family.disclaimer: Fakatau fāmili fakatupu pe fakalahi ha data pool fakakau. Te ke lava ʻo fakaafe mo toʻo fakamolemole ʻi he taimi kotoa.
family.footnote: Fakatau fāmili fakakau ha data pool taha ʻi he kau Chatforia fakakau. Fakamālie mo e limit ʻoku fakatonu ʻi hoʻo fonua mo e fakatonu fonua.

why.title: Ko e hā ʻoku liliu ai e kau tangata ki he Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia ʻoku ne foaki ha fika telefoni fakamolemole, fakaliliu fakamālie, mo e hala fakatonu ke foki taʻe ads kapau ʻoku ke fakatonu.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ads siʻi ange ʻi he Free, fakalakalaka Plus fakatonu kapau ʻoku ke fakatonu, mo e AI meʻa ʻoku ʻikai ke maʻu ʻe TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App fakatonu, fakatonu fakamāmani, mo e fakaliliu ʻi loto ʻi he fakafolosi lea fakamuʻa.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs app fakamolemole
messengers.body: Fakamolemole fika telefoni fakamolemole — ʻikai ko e kau app pe — mo e AI mo e status ʻi loto. Fakatonu kapau ʻoku ke mei app hangē ko TextFree pe TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Fakatau ʻoku fakatonu ʻi he fakamālie fakapuliki mo e lava ʻo liliu. App fakamolemole taʻe totongi kehe hangē ko TextFree pe TextMe ʻoku fakatonu mo TextNow.

free.q: ʻOku taʻe totongi moʻoni ha fakatau Free?
free.a: ʻIo. Ko e fakatau Free ʻoku ne fakakau ha fika Chatforia, lea, mo fakamolemole mo e ads. Te ke lava ʻo fakamālie ʻi he Free ʻi he taimi kotoa, pe fakalakalaka ke toʻo ads mo fakalelei ha meʻa kehe.

plusPremium.q: Ko e hā e kehe ʻi he Plus mo e Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus ʻoku ne toʻo ads mo fakalahi hoʻo fakamolemole fakamālie — fakatonu ki he fakamolemole fakatonu. Premium ʻoku ne fakakau fakatonu kehe, AI meʻa ki he fakafoki mo fakamālie, mo e tokoni fakamuʻomuʻa ki he kau ngāue lahi.

esim.q: Ko fe ʻoku ngāue ai e eSIM data packs?
esim.a: Chatforia Telefoni ʻoku ne fakaʻata fakamāmani eSIM. Fakamālie ʻoku fakatonu ʻi hoʻo fonua mo hoʻo meʻa. Te ke vakai ha fakatonu fakalelei ʻi he taimi ʻoku ke fakalelei ʻi he app.

cancel.q: Te ke lava ʻo ikuna pe fakafoki fakatau ʻi he taimi kotoa?
cancel.a: ʻIo. Te ke lava ʻo pule pe ikuna hoʻo fakatau mei he peisi billing ʻi he app. Ko e liliu ʻoku ngāue ʻi he ikuna ʻo hoʻo fakatau fakamolemole.

family.q: Ko e hā ʻoku ngāue ai e fakatau Fāmili?
family.a: Fakatau Fāmili fakatupu ha data pool fakakau ʻi he kau Chatforia fakakau. Ko e taha ʻoku totongi e fika, pea te ke lava ʻo fakaafe pe toʻo fakamolemole mo fokotuʻu limit ki he taha.

gettingStarted.title: Kamata
gettingStarted.subtitle: Foʻou ki he Chatforia? Ko e fakatonu vave ko ʻeni ʻoku fakaʻata ha meʻa fakamuʻomuʻa ke ke lava ʻo ngāue ʻi he miniti siʻi.

alert.text: Ko e fakatonu ko ʻeni ʻe fakalahi kapau ʻoku mau fakalelei meʻa foʻou. Kapau ʻoku ʻikai ha meʻa, fakamālie mau mei he

section2.title: 2) Kamata fakamolemole
section2.item1: Fakatupu ha DM pe Group pea fakamolemole hoʻo fakamolemole fakamuimui.
section2.item2: Fakaʻata fakaliliu vave ke fakamolemole ʻi he lea 100+.
section2.item3: Fakaʻata fakamolemole fakamotuʻa mo e fakamālie ʻo lau ʻi he Profile → Fakamālie.

section3.title: 3) Foki ange
section3.item1: Te ke lava ʻo fakalakalaka ki ha fakatau totongi ʻi he taimi kotoa ʻi he app.
section3.item2: Kapau ʻoku ke fakamālie, te ke lava ʻo fakakau meʻa kehe mo fokotuʻu fakamolemole fakapuliki mei he Settings ʻi he app.

account.q: Ko e hā hoku founga ke fakatupu pe fakafoki hoku tohi fakamolemole?
account.a: Fakalahi e app pe fakaʻata web, tā “Fakatupu tohi fakamolemole”, fakamālie hoʻo email/telefoni. Ke fakafoki, fakaʻata “Ngaohi password”.

privacy.q: ʻOku fakapuliki fakatautaha ha fakamolemole mo e lea?
privacy.a: ʻIo. Fakamolemole mo e lea ʻoku fakapuliki fakatautaha fakatonu. Ko koe mo e fakamolemole pe te nau lava ʻo lau ia.

translate.q: Ko e hā ʻoku ngāue ai e fakaliliu vave?
translate.a: Fakalelei “Fakaliliu fakatonu” ʻi he Settings → Fakaata & Lea. Mau fakaliliu ʻi he meʻa kapau ʻoku fakalelei, pe ʻi he API fakamālie mo e metadata siʻi.

contact.a: Fakamālie mau ʻi he support@chatforia.com. Fakakau screenshots mo hoʻo app version.

contact.title: Fakamālie mau
contact.successMsg: Mālō—ʻe fakamālie homau kau ʻi he email.
contact.errorSend: ʻIkai lava ʻo fakamolemole. Fakamālie support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Ko e Fakatonu Fakamālie ko ʻeni ʻoku fakaʻata pe ʻoku fakakau, fakaʻata, mo fakakau fakamolemole ʻi he taimi ʻoku ke fakaʻata homau app mo e tokoni. Mau fokotuʻu Chatforia ke fakasi ha fakamālie ʻoku mau lava ʻo maʻu.

infoWeCollect.title: Fakamālie ʻoku mau fakakau
infoWeCollect.account: Fakamālie tohi fakamolemole (e.g., email/telefoni) ke fakatupu mo fakamālie hoʻo tohi fakamolemole.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Fakamolemole fakapuliki (fakamolemole/lea) ʻoku fakapuliki fakatautaha; ʻikai ke mau lava ʻo lau ia.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Fakamālie fakatonu/hala hangē ko e crash logs, fakatonu meʻa, pe fakatonu fakatonu ke fakalakalaka.

sms.title: Fika telefoni mo e SMS
sms.body: Kapau ʻoku ke fili ʻo fakakau ha fika telefoni, mau fakaʻata ia ke fakalelei meʻa hangē ko e fakamālie tohi fakamolemole, fakamālie fakamālie, mo e fakamolemole fakamolemole ʻi he SMS kapau ʻoku fakalelei. Mau lava ʻo fakamolemole SMS fakatonu fekauʻaki mo hoʻo tohi fakamolemole mo e ngāue ʻi he Chatforia. Te ke lava ʻo fakatau ʻo maʻu ha SMS ʻi he taimi kotoa ʻi he fakamālie “STOP” pe fakafoki hoʻo fakamālie fakamālie ʻi he app. ʻIkai mau fakatau hoʻo fika telefoni pe fakaʻata ia ki he fakamālie fakatonu.
sms.addRecipient: Fakahu ha fakamolemole ʻi olunga ke kamata…

howWeUse.title: Pe ʻoku mau fakaʻata fakamālie
howWeUse.provide: Fakakau mo fakamālie e tokoni (fakamālie, fakatonu spam/abuse).

sharing.title: Fakakau
sharing.body: ʻIkai mau fakatau fakamālie fakatonu. Mau lava ʻo fakakau fakamālie fakatonu mo e kau tokoni (e.g., fakamālie fakamālie, fakatonu) ʻi he fakatonu fakatonu.

rights.title: Hoʻo totonu
rights.body: Fakatonu ʻi hoʻo fonua (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), te ke lava ʻo fie maʻu fakamālie, fakatonu, toʻo, pe fakatau ha tokoni fakatonu. Fakamālie: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Fakamālie fakamālie & fakamālie
retention.body: Mau fakamālie pe ha meʻa ʻoku fie maʻu ke ngāue e tokoni mo fakaʻata fakamālie fakatonu. Fakamolemole fakapuliki fakatautaha ʻoku ʻikai ke lava ʻo fakatonu ʻe mau.

children.title: Fānau
children.body: Chatforia ʻoku ʻikai ke ne fakaʻata ki he fānau ʻi lalo 13 (pe hangē ko e fakatonu ʻi hoʻo fonua).

changes.title: Liliu
changes.body: Mau fakamolemole fakafou ʻi heni mo fakafou e “Fakafou fakamuimui”.

contact.title: Fakamālie
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: ʻI he fakaʻata Chatforia ʻoku ke tali ki he Fakatonu ko ʻeni. Kapau ʻoku ʻikai ke ke tali, ʻoua ke fakaʻata e tokoni.

accounts.title: Tohi fakamolemole
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Fakakau fakamālie fakatonu pea fakamālie hoʻo fakamālie fakamālie.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Ko koe pule ki he ngāue ʻi hoʻo tohi fakamolemole.

acceptableUse.title: Fakaʻata fakatonu
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: ʻIkai ha meʻa fakatonu, fakamālie, pe fakatonu; ʻikai ha spam pe fakatonu fakatonu.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Mau lava ʻo fakamotuʻa/ikuna ki he fakatonu.

sms.title: Fakamolemole SMS
sms.body: Kapau ʻoku ke fakakau ha fika telefoni, ʻoku ke tali ke Chatforia fakamolemole SMS fekauʻaki mo hoʻo tohi fakamolemole mo e ngāue ʻo e tokoni, hangē ko e fakamālie fakamālie, fakamālie fakamālie, mo e fakamolemole fekauʻaki mo e fakamolemole ʻoku ke kamata pe kau. ʻIkai mau fakaʻata SMS ki he fakamālie fakatonu taʻe tali. ʻOku lava ʻo fie totongi ha meʻa & data. Te ke lava ʻo fakatau SMS ʻi he taimi kotoa ʻi he fakamālie “STOP” pe fakafoki hoʻo fakamālie fakamālie ʻi he app.

yourContent.title: Hoʻo meʻa
yourContent.body: ʻOku ke maʻu hoʻo totonu ki hoʻo meʻa. ʻOku ke foaki mau totonu fie maʻu ke ngāue e tokoni (e.g., fakafolosi, fakamālie, fakaliliu).

disclaimer.title: Fakatonu & fakatonu
disclaimer.body: Tokoni ʻoku foaki “hangē ko e” taʻe fakatonu. Ki he fakatonu kotoa ʻoku fakatonu ʻe he fakatonu, Chatforia ʻoku ʻikai ke ne fakatonu ki he hala fakatonu pe fakatonu fakatonu.

changes.title: Liliu
changes.body: Mau lava ʻo fakafou e fakatonu; fakaʻata fakamolemole ʻi he liliu ʻoku fakatonu.

contact.title: Fakamālie
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: ʻIkai fakatau pe fakakau hoku fakamālie fakatonu
doNotSell.body: Chatforia ʻoku ʻikai ke ne fakatau fakamālie fakatonu. Kau California te nau lava ʻo fakamolemole request ʻi he CPRA ʻi he button ʻi olunga.

cookies.title: Settings Cookie
cookies.body: Chatforia ʻoku ne fakaʻata cookie siʻi (e.g., fakamālie, fakamālie). ʻIkai mau fakaʻata ads cookie fakahō. Pule cookie ʻi hoʻo browser settings.

confirm.reset:
Fakafoki fakapuliki ki he tohi fakamolemole ko ʻeni?

Fakamolemole fakapuliki motuʻa ʻe lava ʻo ʻikai ke lava ʻo lau kapau ʻoku ʻikai ke ke fakafoki e kī motuʻa hili.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Ko e ngāue ko ʻeni ʻoku fakatupu ha kī fakapuliki foʻou ki hoʻo tohi fakamolemole. Fakamolemole fakapuliki motuʻa ʻe lava ʻo ʻikai ke lava ʻo lau kapau ʻoku ʻikai ke ke fakafoki e kī motuʻa hili.

footer.patentPending: Patent ʻi he taimi ko ʻeni

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: Ki he fakamālie media, fakamālie mau ʻi he
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia ko ha app fakamolemole fakamālie fakamuʻomuʻa ʻoku ne fakalelei fakamolemole lea kehe. Fakamolemole ʻoku fakapuliki fakatautaha fakatonu, mo e fakaliliu ʻi loto ʻoku fakalelei lea 100+ ʻi he taimi tonu. Kau fakamolemole te nau lava ʻo fakalelei fakamolemole fakamotuʻa, fakamālie ʻo lau fakatonu, mo fakamālie ʻi he meʻa. Maʻu ʻi he iOS, Android, mo e web.
press.assetsSubtitle: Logos, screenshots, mo e fakaata meʻa.
press.scanTip: ʻI he desktop? Fakaʻata mo hoʻo telefoni ke maʻu e app.
press.googlePlay: Maʻu ia ʻi he Google Play

careers.title: Ngāue
careers.intro: ʻOku mau siʻi kau fakatupu ʻoku mau langa Chatforia — ha fakamolemole fakamāmani fakamālie fakatonu ʻi he web, iOS, mo Android. Kapau ʻoku ke fie maʻu fakamālie, fakapuliki, mo e fakamolemole fakatonu fakamālie, ʻoku mau fie fanongo meiate koe.
careers.openRoles: Fakatonu ngāue fakatupu: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Pe ʻoku ke fakatonu: Fakaʻata e button ʻi olunga ke fakamolemole hoʻo resume mo e link.
careers.whyNow: Ko e hā ʻoku fie kau ai he taimi ko ʻeni?
careers.whyBullets:
• Tokoni ki he fakatupu fakamolemole fakamāmani foʻou.
• Fakalahi fakalakalaka ʻoku ngāue ʻi he web, iOS, mo Android.
• Ngāue vave mo e fakatupu ʻi he architecture mo e fakatonu meʻa.
• Pule ha konga pāoa ʻi he stack: fakamolemole, lea, vitio, fakapuliki, telefoni, AI.
• Kau ʻi he kamata — ʻi muʻa he kau fakamolemole ʻe fakalahi.

about.title: Fekauʻaki mo Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia ko ha fakamolemole fakamālie fakalelei lea mo e fakapuliki fakatautaha, fakaliliu vave, mo e lea/vitio. Ko homau fakatonu ko e fakatonu: tokoni ki he kau tangata ke fakatau—fakamālie, fakamālie, mo e lea kehe.
about.valuesTitle: Ko e hā ʻoku mau fie maʻu

values.access: Fakamālie ki he taha kotoa: Fakaliliu fakatonu lea 100+.
values.control: Pule: Fakamolemole fakamotuʻa & fakamālie ʻo lau ʻoku fakatonu.
values.access_aria: Fakamālie ki he taha kotoa: Fakaliliu fakatonu lea 100+.
values.control_aria: Pule: Fakamolemole fakamotuʻa mo e fakamālie ʻo lau ʻoku fakatonu.

about.howDescription: Fakamolemole ʻoku fakapuliki ʻi hoʻo meʻa ʻi muʻa ke hiki. Fakaliliu, fakamolemole, mo fakamālie meʻa ʻoku fokotuʻu ke fakasi ha meʻa ʻoku mau lava ʻo vakai ʻi he server.

advertise.title: Fakamālie mo Chatforia
advertise.description: Fakamālie kau fakamolemole fakatonu mo e fakatonu fakamālie fakatonu. Mau foaki banner ʻi he feituʻu fakamālie, fakamālie, mo e fakamālie fale. Kau Premium ʻoku ʻikai ke nau vakai ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Mau fakaʻata inventory ʻi he Google AdSense. Te ke lava ʻo fakatonu Chatforia mo e publisher ID {{pubId}}, pe fakaʻata e form ʻi olunga ki he fakamālie fakatonu.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Mau fakaʻata ha inventory siʻi ʻi he Google AdSense. Fakamālie fakatonu ʻoku maʻu—fakaʻata e form ʻi olunga.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Mau fakakakā homau ad inventory. Tala mai hoʻo fakamālie pea mau fakatonu ha placement.

why.highSession: Fakamolemole lahi mo e taimi lahi ʻi he fakamolemole UI
why.sponsoredMoments: Fakamālie fakatonu (e.g., “Kamata ha Fakamolemole” modal) maʻu
why.deals: Fakamālie fakatonu pe fakatonu ʻi he AdSense/Google Ads
